title: quercus pedunculiflora var. erucifolia
intro: Quercus pedunculiflora var. erucifolia, also known as the Korean oak or Korean white oak, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia, characterized by its distinctive white bark and lobed leaves. The medicinal properties of Quercus pedunculiflora var. erucifolia lie in its high concentration of flavonoids and tannins, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus pedunculiflora var. erucifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
